items.name: Yellow Neon Cartoony Top Hat
items.description:
This Top Hat features a Yellow color with a smooth surface and a thin white band wrapped neatly around the base of the Hat, adding it a sleek and elegant contrast to the vibrant Yellow color.

Pro Tip: Is the Item too small? Too big? Bad Positioned?
Use Robloxs Accessory Adjustment mode!

Find more Top Hats here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=top+hat&Category=1&CreatorName=Accessory+Roulette&salesTypeFilter=1
